_comment: Copy this file to i18n-dashboard.config.json and fill in your values. All settings are optional — you can also use environment variables.

branding._comment: Customize the dashboard identity shown in the sidebar.
branding.name: My i18n Dashboard
branding.subtitle: Translation Manager

theme._comment: Override the primary color using any Tailwind color name.
theme._primary_options: blue | violet | green | red | orange | teal | cyan | indigo | purple | pink | rose | sky | emerald | amber | lime | fuchsia | yellow

widgets._comment: Define custom iframe widgets that appear in the widget picker.

custom._comment: Example: embed an external metrics dashboard
custom.label: My Metrics
custom.description: Shows custom metrics from an external source
